latest_news.headline: UAE intercepts 4 ballistic missiles and 25 UAVs launched from Iran TODAY
latest_news.source: Gulf News / UAE Ministry of Defence
latest_news.text: UAE air defence intercepted 4 ballistic missiles + 25 drones from Iran today. Cumulative since war start: 345 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, 1,773 UAVs intercepted. 2 UAE military + 6 foreign nationals killed, 160 injured.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts ~60 Iranian drones, 3 ballistic missiles toward Riyadh
latest_news.text: Saudi Arabia intercepted nearly 60 Iranian drones targeting Eastern Province energy facilities. 3 ballistic missiles launched toward Riyadh - 1 intercepted, 2 fell in uninhabited areas. Saudi also expelled Iranian military attache + staff.

latest_news.headline: Iran death toll passes 1,500, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.source: Al Jazeera / Iran Ministry of Health
latest_news.text: Iran state broadcaster confirms 1,500+ killed, 20,984 injured from US-Israeli attacks. 7 hospitals evacuated, 36 ambulances damaged.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes hit eastern Tehran - geographic expansion of attacks
latest_news.text: Israel launched new attacks on Tehran on Sunday, explosions reported in the east of the city - further geographic expansion of strikes beyond oil depot/refinery strikes.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 66% (stable). Day 22 Hour 22 UTC. IMMINENT (stable). Israel strikes Qasmiyeh Bridge - key crossing. Aoun: 'prelude to ground invasion.' Katz: systematic home demolitions + bridge destruction. IDF Chief: 'midway through war.' 450k mobilized. Updated 2026-03-22T22:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel orders military to intensify demolitions of bridges + homes in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz orders IDF to step up destruction of bridges and demolish homes in frontline villages in southern Lebanon. Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Katz: operations will continue until threats to Israeli communities eliminated.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: ISW: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

CEASEFIRE VIOLATIONS ESCALATING: Ariana News confirms Pakistani military violated ceasefire AGAIN. Multiple breaches reported. ICG: 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' latest_news.headline: Eid ceasefire breaches mount: Mortar fire in Kunar/Paktika, 1 killed
latest_news.text: Taliban accuses Pakistan of firing mortars in Kunar and Paktika during Eid ceasefire - 1 civilian killed. Taliban chief of staff calls it 'deception.' ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire technically holds through Mar 24 midnight but fraying badly. Multiple breach reports.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 18 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire technically through Mar 24 but breached (mortar fire Kunar/Paktika). IAEA confirms no radiation at Dimona/Natanz. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~28hrs. IRGC threatens 'complete' Hormuz closure + retaliation on ALL regional infrastructure. Bessent: 'escalate to de-escalate' + Kharg Island occupation possible. 2,500 more marines deploying. 2,000+ dead. NET: IMMINENT ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. Pakistan ceasefire fraying — post-Eid violence feared.

latest_news.headline: AP: Iran and US trade threats to attack power plants as war enters fourth week
latest_news.text: War now in its fourth week. Iran says Hormuz will be 'completely closed' if power plants struck. Qalibaf: 'entities that finance US military budget are legitimate targets.' 2,000+ killed. Oil surging.

latest_news.headline: Iran UN ambassador: Power plant strikes 'inherently indiscriminate and clearly disproportionate'
latest_news.text: Iran's UN ambassador writes to Security Council arguing power plant strikes violate international law. Frames as legal case ahead of ultimatum deadline.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel detected MORE Iranian missiles fired toward Dimona area Sunday evening
latest_news.text: Netanyahu visits Dimona crater, calls it 'miracle' no one killed. Israel detects additional Iranian missiles toward Negev nuclear area Sunday evening. Nuclear tit-for-tat continues.

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Qasmiyeh Bridge - key crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country
latest_news.text: Israel attacks Qasmiyeh Bridge, key crossing linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Aoun calls it 'prelude to ground invasion.' Systematic infrastructure isolation of south Lebanon.

latest_news.headline: NATO SecGen: 22 nations now signed up to Hormuz naval initiative
latest_news.text: Rutte confirms 22 nations joining Hormuz safe passage initiative led by UK's Starmer. Expanded coalition beyond original 5-nation joint statement.

latest_news.headline: Israel orders intensification of home demolitions + bridge destruction in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Katz orders systematic demolition of frontline homes + bridges. Aoun: 'prelude to ground invasion.' IDF Chief: operation 'has only begun.'

latest_news.headline: Pakistani military violates Afghanistan ceasefire AGAIN - multiple breaches
latest_news.text: Ariana News confirms Pakistani military violated ceasefire again. Multiple breaches reported during Eid period. ICG warns 'deadly violence likely without dialogue.' Ceasefire through Mar 23-24 but effectively dead.

latest_news.headline: Iran vows 'irreversible' destruction of regional energy + water infrastructure if power plants struck
latest_news.text: Iran military warns 'irreversible' destruction of all regional energy and water infrastructure if US/Israel strikes power plants. Desalination plants explicitly threatened.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 22:04 UTC). Trump ultimatum ~23hrs to deadline. Iran retaliates with Hormuz closure threat + desalination plant targeting. Qalibaf extends threats to 'entities financing US military.' Netanyahu: more Iranian missiles toward Dimona area. Israel destroys Qasmiyeh Bridge in Lebanon. War entering 4th week. NET: PEAK ESCALATION approaching ultimatum deadline.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 22 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Pakistan Eid ceasefire technically through Mar 24 but badly frayed. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona/Natanz. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~23hrs. Qalibaf new threat to US military financiers. More Iranian missiles toward Dimona. Israel destroys Qasmiyeh Bridge. War entering 4th week. 2,500 more marines. NET: PEAK ESCALATION toward ultimatum deadline. No de-escalation signals anywhere.
